hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *.sh ]]; then result=$(shellcheck "$f" 2>&1) && exit 0; jq -n --arg out "$result" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"shellcheck: \($out)"}}'; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *.lua ]]; then result=$(XDG_DATA_HOME="$HOME/Developments/DOORway/Configs/.local/share" Hyprland --verify-config -c "$HOME/Developments/DOORway/Configs/.config/hypr/hyprland.lua" 2>&1); filtered=$(echo "$result" | grep -E 'ERR|error:|nil|attempt to call' | head -20); [[ -z "$filtered" ]] && exit 0; jq -n --arg out "$filtered" '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Hyprland --verify-config errors: \($out)"}}'; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
